attachments.fallback: How to Open MDB Files Manually - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text:
Here are the most common manual method to open MDB files:

1. Using Microsoft Access Runtime: Microsoft provides a free runtime version of Access. This allows you to open and run Access applications and view MDB files without needing to purchase the full version of Microsoft Access.

How to:

Download and install the appropriate version of Microsoft Access Runtime from the official Microsoft webs…
